word: G1019 - βραδύνω - bradýnō - brad-oo'-no - Be slack

sections.paragraph:
- Original: βραδύνω

- Transliteration: Braduno

- Phonetic: brad-oo'-no

- Definition:

1. to delay, be slow

a. to render slowly, retard

b. to be long, to tarry, loiter

- Origin: from G1021

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1021; to delay: - be slack tarry.
